---
title: "Can the co-localization of CD8+, PD-1, PD-L1 AND PD-L2 patterns provide guidance in clinical outcomes of patients with head and neck cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma?"
date: 2025-09-01
author:
  - name: Bento, Gustavo Nunes
  - name: De Oliveira Santos, Andre Bandiera
  - name: Matos, Leandro Luongo
  - name: Faquin, William C.
  - name: Pai, Sara I.
  - name: Cernea, Claudio Roberto
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Brazilian Journal of Otorhinolaryngology"
  volume: 91
  issue: 5
  doi: "10.1016/j.bjorl.2025.101632"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Can the co-localization of CD8+, PD-1, PD-L1 AND PD-L2 patterns provide guidance in clinical outcomes of patients with head and neck cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma?</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
